nasb.text: But it is still my consolation, And I rejoice in unsparing pain, That I have not denied the words of the Holy One.

esv.text: This would be my comfort; I would even exult in pain unsparing, for I have not denied the words of the Holy One.

cnv.text: 這樣，我們得安慰， 在無情的痛苦之中我還可以歡躍， 因為我沒有否認那聖者的言語。

ccb.text: 这样，我还能感到欣慰， 在残酷的痛苦中雀跃， 因我没有违背圣者之言。
